requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — IEC 62368-1 / MNS Standards for 220 V / 50 Hz Soviet-Legacy Grid (Type C/E)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——针对220V/50Hz苏联遗留电网（C/E型插头）的IEC 62368-1 / MNS标准
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——針對220V/50Hz蘇聯遺留電網（C/E型插頭）的IEC 62368-1 / MNS標準

summary.en: Mongolia operates on a 220 V / 50 Hz electrical grid, inherited from Soviet-era infrastructure, and uses Type C (Europlug, CEE 7/16) and Type E (French standard, CEE 7/5) sockets — the Soviet-legacy standard widely prevalent across CIS-adjacent territories. This is distinct from Kazakhstan (Type C/F) and from China (220 V but Type A/I plugs). Electrical safety for electronic and electrical equipment sold in Mongolia is governed by Mongolian national legislation and standards administered through MASM (Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology). Mongolia is not a member of the EAEU and the EAEU electrical safety technical regulation TR EAEU 004/2011 does not apply. Mongolia has adopted MNS (Mongolian National Standards) based on IEC publications; for audio/video, IT, and communications technology equipment, the relevant safety standard reference is IEC 62368-1 (adopted as MNS IEC 62368-1 where published) which has superseded IEC 60950-1. In practice, CITA type approval may encompass electrical safety review for mains-powered telecommunications and radio equipment; importers should confirm whether a separate MASM-issued safety certificate is additionally required for their specific product category. Products must be adapted to the Mongolian Type C/E plug configuration and 220 V / 50 Hz supply parameters. Chinese products designed for 220 V have a voltage advantage, but the plug type (Type A/I in China vs. Type C/E in Mongolia) requires adaptation.
summary.zh: 蒙古国使用从苏联时代传承下来的220V/50Hz电网，采用C型（欧规插头，CEE 7/16）和E型（法国标准，CEE 7/5）插座——这一苏联遗留标准在独联体相邻地区广泛使用。这与哈萨克斯坦（C/F型）和中国（220V但使用A/I型插头）不同。蒙古国销售的电气和电子设备的电气安全受蒙古国国家法规和由MASM（蒙古国标准与计量局）管理的标准约束。蒙古国不是EAEU成员国，EAEU电气安全技术法规TR EAEU 004/2011不适用。蒙古国已采纳基于IEC出版物的MNS（蒙古国国家标准）；对于音视频、IT及通信技术设备，相关安全标准参考为IEC 62368-1（已出版则为MNS IEC 62368-1），已取代IEC 60950-1。实践中，CITA型号核准可能涵盖对市电供电的电信和无线电设备的电气安全审查；进口商应确认其特定产品类别是否还需额外取得MASM颁发的安全证书。产品须适配蒙古国C/E型插头配置及220V/50Hz供电参数。为220V设计的中国产品具有电压优势，但插头类型（中国为A/I型，蒙古国为C/E型）需要适配。
summary.zht: 蒙古國使用從蘇聯時代傳承下來的220V/50Hz電網，採用C型（歐規插頭，CEE 7/16）和E型（法國標準，CEE 7/5）插座——這一蘇聯遺留標準在獨聯體相鄰地區廣泛使用。這與哈薩克斯坦（C/F型）和中國（220V但使用A/I型插頭）不同。蒙古國銷售的電氣和電子設備的電氣安全受蒙古國國家法規和由MASM（蒙古國標準與計量局）管理的標準約束。蒙古國不是EAEU成員國，EAEU電氣安全技術法規TR EAEU 004/2011不適用。蒙古國已採納基於IEC出版物的MNS（蒙古國國家標準）；對於音視頻、IT及通信技術設備，相關安全標準參考為IEC 62368-1（已出版則為MNS IEC 62368-1），已取代IEC 60950-1。實踐中，CITA型號核准可能涵蓋對市電供電的電信和無線電設備的電氣安全審查；進口商應確認其特定產品類別是否還需額外取得MASM頒發的安全證書。產品須適配蒙古國C/E型插頭配置及220V/50Hz供電參數。為220V設計的中國產品具有電壓優勢，但插頭類型（中國為A/I型，蒙古國為C/E型）需要適配。

standards_or_laws: MNS IEC 62368-1 (where adopted) — Mongolian National Standard based on IEC 62368-1: Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment safety requirements; administered by MASM
Law of Mongolia on Standardization — establishes the role of MASM in adopting national standards and conformity assessment
Mongolia grid: 220 V / 50 Hz; Plug type C (CEE 7/16 Europlug) and type E (CEE 7/5 French standard) — Soviet-legacy socket standard

summary.en: China's mandatory electrical safety standard for information technology equipment is GB 4943.1 (aligned with IEC 60950-1), enforced through CCC certification administered by CNCA. A newer standard GB/T 42315 (aligned with IEC 62368-1) has been published and is being progressively introduced. China uses a 220 V / 50 Hz grid (voltage-compatible with Mongolia) but uses Type A (flat two-pin) and Type I (oblique flat three-pin) plugs, which are not compatible with Mongolia's Type C/E sockets. CCC electrical safety certification to GB 4943.1 does not substitute for Mongolian safety requirements under MNS IEC 62368-1 or MASM conformity assessment. The plug type difference between China (Type A/I) and Mongolia (Type C/E) requires physical product adaptation or the supply of an appropriate adapter.
summary.zh: 中国信息技术设备的强制性电气安全标准为GB 4943.1（与IEC 60950-1接轨），通过国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）管理的CCC认证执行。更新版标准GB/T 42315（与IEC 62368-1接轨）已发布并正逐步推行。中国使用220V/50Hz电网（与蒙古国电压兼容），但使用A型（扁平两脚）和I型（斜扁三脚）插头，与蒙古国C/E型插座不兼容。基于GB 4943.1的CCC电气安全认证不可替代MNS IEC 62368-1下的蒙古国安全要求或MASM合格评定。中国（A/I型）与蒙古国（C/E型）的插头类型差异需要对实体产品进行适配或配套提供适当适配器。
summary.zht: 中國信息技術設備的強制性電氣安全標準為GB 4943.1（與IEC 60950-1接軌），通過國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）管理的CCC認證執行。更新版標準GB/T 42315（與IEC 62368-1接軌）已發布並正逐步推行。中國使用220V/50Hz電網（與蒙古國電壓相容），但使用A型（扁平兩腳）和I型（斜扁三腳）插頭，與蒙古國C/E型插座不相容。基於GB 4943.1的CCC電氣安全認證不可替代MNS IEC 62368-1下的蒙古國安全要求或MASM合格評定。中國（A/I型）與蒙古國（C/E型）的插頭類型差異需要對實體產品進行適配或配套提供適當適配器。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — Safety of information technology equipment — Part 1: General requirements (CCC mandatory, aligned with IEC 60950-1)
GB/T 42315 — Safety requirements for audio/video, information and communication technology equipment (aligned with IEC 62368-1)
China grid: 220 V / 50 Hz; Plug type A (flat two-pin) and I (oblique flat three-pin) — incompatible with Mongolia Type C/E

gap.en: Chinese CCC electrical safety certification (GB 4943.1) does not substitute for Mongolian electrical safety conformity under MNS IEC 62368-1 or MASM requirements. Mongolia is not in the EAEU, so no EAC safety certificate (TR EAEU 004/2011) is required or provides equivalence — Mongolia applies its own MNS-based national framework. While China and Mongolia both use 220 V / 50 Hz, the plug standard differs (Type A/I in China vs. Type C/E in Mongolia), requiring product plug adaptation or replacement. Importers should confirm with MASM whether a standalone safety certificate is required for their product category in addition to the CITA type approval process, as Mongolia's conformity assessment structure for electrical safety is still developing. Products designed for Chinese Type A plugs may need a plug swap or bundled adapter for the Mongolian Type C/E market.
gap.zh: 中国CCC电气安全认证（GB 4943.1）不可替代MNS IEC 62368-1下的蒙古国电气安全合规或MASM要求。蒙古国不在EAEU体系内，因此无需EAC安全证书（TR EAEU 004/2011），也不提供等同效力——蒙古国采用基于MNS的国家框架。尽管中国和蒙古国均使用220V/50Hz，但插头标准不同（中国为A/I型，蒙古国为C/E型），需要对产品插头进行适配或更换。进口商应向MASM确认其产品类别除CITA型号核准程序外是否还需额外独立安全证书，因蒙古国电气安全合格评定体系仍在完善中。为中国A型插头设计的产品可能需要为蒙古国C/E型市场更换插头或随附适配器。
gap.zht: 中國CCC電氣安全認證（GB 4943.1）不可替代MNS IEC 62368-1下的蒙古國電氣安全合規或MASM要求。蒙古國不在EAEU體系內，因此無需EAC安全證書（TR EAEU 004/2011），也不提供等同效力——蒙古國採用基於MNS的國家框架。儘管中國和蒙古國均使用220V/50Hz，但插頭標準不同（中國為A/I型，蒙古國為C/E型），需要對產品插頭進行適配或更換。進口商應向MASM確認其產品類別除CITA型號核准程序外是否還需額外獨立安全證書，因蒙古國電氣安全合格評定體系仍在完善中。為中國A型插頭設計的產品可能需要為蒙古國C/E型市場更換插頭或隨附適配器。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — electrical safety conformity to MNS IEC 62368-1 (or applicable MNS standard) required for mains-powered wireless and IoT devices sold in Mongolia; plug adaptation from Chinese Type A/I to Mongolian Type C/E required; EAEU EAC not applicable
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification to GB 4943.1 required for in-scope IT and AV equipment sold in China

source.publisher: MASM — Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety conformity to MNS IEC 62368-1 (or applicable MNS standard administered by MASM) is required for mains-powered wireless and IoT devices sold in Mongolia. Chinese CCC / GB 4943.1 certification does not substitute. EAEU EAC safety certificates do not apply — Mongolia is not an EAEU member. Products must be adapted from Chinese Type A/I plugs to Mongolian Type C/E sockets. Importers should confirm with MASM whether a standalone safety certificate is needed in addition to the CITA type approval submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在蒙古国销售的市电供电无线及物联网设备须符合MNS IEC 62368-1（或MASM管理的适用MNS标准）的电气安全要求。中国CCC / GB 4943.1认证不可替代。EAEU EAC安全证书不适用——蒙古国不是EAEU成员国。产品须从中国A/I型插头适配为蒙古国C/E型插座。进口商应向MASM确认除提交CITA型号核准申请外是否还需额外独立安全证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在蒙古國銷售的市電供電無線及物聯網設備須符合MNS IEC 62368-1（或MASM管理的適用MNS標準）的電氣安全要求。中國CCC / GB 4943.1認證不可替代。EAEU EAC安全證書不適用——蒙古國不是EAEU成員國。產品須從中國A/I型插頭適配為蒙古國C/E型插座。進口商應向MASM確認除提交CITA型號核准申請外是否還需額外獨立安全證書。
